item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 7271d14 Add XDF Inspector utility and HTTP server functionality
  • 868f80a feat: add gitref-toolbox CLI package and reinject infrastructure
  • bd85ebb fix: cache inherited environment variables to optimize git calls over SMB
  • 926ddee feat: add data quality inspector for per-participant quality diagnostics
  • a77691a fix: use system environment variables for git command execution

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →
